sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109152" key="u(posku/fios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποσκύφιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[κῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109152.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beneath the scalp</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pericranium,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.22</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
